name: Workflow F — Scheduled One-Off Surge Events

parameters.content:
## Workflow F — Scheduled One-Off Surge Events

**Trigger:** POST /webhook/schedule-surge

**Purpose:** Accepts a specific future date/time for a surge test (up to 15 days ahead), validates it, saves to the scheduled_surges table in Supabase, and confirms in Discord. Workflow G polls every minute and fires when due.

**Flow:**
Webhook (POST /schedule-surge) → Validate schedule (Code — checks ISO date, in future, within 15 days) → Save surge event (Postgres insert, status=pending) → Confirm Discord → Respond { scheduled: true, scheduledAt, label, delayMinutes }

**Payload format:**
```json
{
  "scheduledAt": "2026-06-15T14:00:00+10:00",
  "label": "itch new release day"
}
```

**Called by:** Dashboard Control page → Surge Event Scheduler card → datetime picker + label → Schedule surge button → api.js scheduleSurge() → this webhook.

**Use case:** Schedule a surge test to fire exactly when itch.io traffic is naturally high (new game release, Reddit post, influencer mention) to get real-world load test data at peak organic traffic.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ scheduled: true, scheduledAt: $json.scheduledAt, label: $json.label, delayMinutes: $json.delayMinutes }) }}
